title: Comparator Result v2
description: Schema for judge output in the Qwen-Only Audiobook Comparator Loop. Version-aligned with comparison_checklist_v2.yaml (schema_version: 2.0). The checklist_schema_version field in each result object must match the checklist's schema_version or the result is rejected as a schema mismatch.

gate_id.description: Must match one of the gate_id values in comparison_checklist_v2.yaml

checklist_schema_version.description: Must match the schema_version of the checklist used for this run. Binding: comparison_checklist_v2.yaml schema_version=2.0. Mismatch routes to manual_review.

pass.description: True if this gate passed, false if it failed. Hard gate: fail → repair loop or manual_review. Scored gate: fail reduces aggregate_score.

gate_type.description: Gate type as defined in checklist. Must match checklist definition.

score.description: Required for scored gates. Null for hard gates. 0.0 = worst, 1.0 = best.

weight.description: Gate weight as defined in checklist. Null for hard gates. Used in aggregate_score calculation.

defect.description: Short structured defect description if pass=false. Null if pass=true. Format follows checklist defect_format.

prompt_patch.description: Suggested instruction patch for the next Qwen draft call if pass=false. Null if pass=true. Applied automatically by PatchApplier — not reviewed by human before injection.

rubric_rules_failed.description: List of rubric rule_ids from static_polish_rubric.yaml that caused deductions. Null if pass=true or no rubric_ref applies.

loop_index.description: 1-indexed loop number that produced this judge result.

section_id.description: Unique identifier for the audiobook section being judged.

locale.description: Locale code for this draft (e.g. zh-TW, zh-HK, ja-JP).

judge_confidence.description: Optional: judge self-reported confidence in its verdict for this gate. Use for human audit sampling prioritization.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this gate was evaluated.

_envelope_schema.description: The loop script wraps the judge result array in an envelope for artifact persistence. The envelope is NOT validated by this schema (it is pipeline-internal) but is documented here for completeness.

envelope_fields.rerun_prompt_hash: string — SHA-256 of patched system prompt for next loop
envelope_fields.prompt_patch: string — assembled patch block injected into next Qwen call
envelope_fields.hard_gates_passed: boolean — all hard gates pass=true this loop
envelope_fields.gate_results: array — the GateResult array validated by this schema
